package rulefixtures

// scenario for go_perf_layer_async_concurrency_mutex_held_during_slow_call: Layer: Async and concurrency. Flag mutex-protected regions that include network, disk, or database calls.
// fixture polarity: negative; family: performance; severity: contextual.
type Rule507NegativeRecord struct {
	ID int
	Name string
	Values []string
}

func scenario507Negative(records []Rule507NegativeRecord) int {
	total := 0
	for _, record := range records {
		total += record.ID + len(record.Values)
	}
	return total
}
